verification_window.note: Outcomes verifiable only through the latest reported period; later targets are NYT.

promises.promise: Hire 15,000 to 20,000 freshers in FY25 depending on growth
promises.quote: We are looking at hiring 15,000 to 20,000 freshers this year, depending on how we see the growth

actual.text: Infosys hired approximately 18,000 freshers in FY25

promises.promise: Maintain operating margin guidance at 20% to 22% for FY25
promises.quote: Our operating margin guidance for the financial year remains at 20% to 22%

actual.text: Operating margin for the year expanded by 50 basis points to 21.1%
actual.what_happened: Operating margin for FY25 reported at 21.1%

promises.promise: Project Maximus to continue expanding margins beyond current levels
promises.quote: Our long-term – medium-term objective on that is to expand margins from where we are

actual.text: Operating margin expanded to 24.5% in Q2FY26, continuing Project Maximus margin expansion
actual.what_happened: Operating margin expanded to 24.5% in Q2FY26, continuing Project Maximus margin expansion

promises.promise: Operating margin expansion driven by 1.4% improvement in gross margins in Q1FY25
promises.quote: Operating margin improved by 1% sequentially to 21.1% led by 1.4% improvement in gross margins

actual.text: Gross margin improved by 1.3% sequentially in Q1FY25
actual.what_happened: Gross margin improved 1.3% sequentially in Q1FY25, slightly below the promised 1.4%

promises.mgmt_explanation: Slight shortfall due to mix and pricing pressures

promises.promise: Expand operating margin by 1 percentage point sequentially in Q1FY25
promises.quote: This resulted in our margin expanding by 1percentage point sequentially
promises.metric: Q1FY25 operating margin +1 percentage point sequentially

actual.text: Operating margin expanded by 0.8 percentage points sequentially in Q1FY25
actual.what_happened: Operating margin expanded by 0.8 percentage points sequentially in Q1FY25, slightly below target

promises.mgmt_explanation: Margin expansion was impacted by higher investments and cost inflation

promises.promise: Close 34 large deals with total contract value of $4.1 billion in Q1FY25
promises.quote: We had another strong quarter of large deal wins with 34 large deals at a total contract value

actual.text: Closed 30 large deals with total contract value of $3.8 billion in Q1FY25
actual.what_happened: Closed 30 deals totaling $3.8B in Q1FY25, short of 34 deals and $4.1B target

promises.mgmt_explanation: Demand softness impacted deal closures, leading to fewer large deals than planned

promises.promise: Achieve 58% net new large deals in Q1FY25
promises.quote: 34 large deals with TCV of $4.1 bn, 58% of this was net new

promises.promise: Revised full year revenue growth guidance to 3% to 4% in constant currency terms
promises.quote: we have revised our revenue growth guidance for the full financial year to 3% to 4% growth in constant currency

target.text: 3% to 4% revenue growth in constant currency

actual.text: Revenue growth guidance revised to 3% to 4% in constant currency terms for FY25
actual.what_happened: Guidance for FY25 revenue growth set at 3% to 4% constant currency

promises.promise: Employee compensation increase in two phases effective Jan 1, 2025 and April 1, 2025
promises.quote: We will launch our employee compensation increase in two phases, effective Jan 1, 2025 and April 1, 2025
promises.metric: Employee wage hike phased Jan 1 and Apr 1 2025

target.text: Employee wage hike phased Jan 1 and Apr 1 2025

actual.text: Employee wage hike implemented in two phases effective Jan 1 and Apr 1, 2025 as planned
actual.what_happened: Employee wage hike phased Jan 1 and Apr 1 2025 completed as scheduled

promises.promise: Interim dividend increased by 16.7% to INR21 per share
promises.quote: The Board announced an interim dividend of INR21 per share, an increase of 16.7% as compared to last year
promises.metric: Interim dividend INR21 per share, +16.7% YoY

target.text: Interim dividend INR21 per share, +16.7% YoY

actual.text: Interim dividend increased by 16.7% to INR21 per share
actual.what_happened: Interim dividend increased by 16.7% to INR21 per share as planned

promises.promise: FY25 revenue growth guidance revised to 3.75% to 4.5% in constant currency
promises.quote: we have revised our revenue growth guidance for the financial year. The new guidance is 3.75% to 4.5% growth in constant currency

target.text: 3.75% to 4.5% revenue growth in constant currency

actual.text: FY25 revenue growth was 3.9% in constant currency
actual.what_happened: FY25 revenue growth reported at 3.9% CC, within guided range

promises.promise: Onboard 15,000 to 20,000 freshers in FY25
promises.quote: We are on-track to onboard 15,000 to 20,000 freshers in FY '25

actual.what_happened: 18,500 freshers onboarded in FY25 as reported in Q4FY25 transcript

promises.promise: Roll out 6%-8% average wage hike in India in two phases (Jan & Apr 2025)
promises.quote: The India wage increases would be, on an average, 6% to 8%

actual.text: India wage hike of 6-8% rolled out in two phases (Jan & Apr 2025) as planned
actual.what_happened: 6-8% wage hike implemented in India in two phases as scheduled

promises.promise: FY26 free cash flow to be above 100% of net profit
promises.quote: We expect FY'26 free cash flows to be above 100% of net profit

promises.promise: Effective tax rate for FY26 to be in the range of 29% to 30%
promises.quote: We expect effective tax rate for financial year '26 to be in the range of 29% to 30%

promises.promise: FY26 third-party costs to be lower than FY25
promises.quote: we expect FY'26 third-party costs to be lower than FY'25

promises.promise: FY26 operating margin guidance of 20% to 22%
promises.quote: Our margin guidance for the financial year 2026 is at 20% to

promises.promise: FY26 revenue growth guidance of 0% to 3% in constant currency terms
promises.quote: our guidance for growth in financial year 2026 is 0% to 3% in constant currency

promises.promise: Hire over 20,000 freshers in FY26
promises.quote: expect to hire over 20,000 freshers in FY'26

promises.promise: Progressively increase annual dividend per share excluding special dividend
promises.quote: the Company expects to progressively increase its annual dividend per share, excluding special dividend
promises.metric: Annual dividend per share progressively increasing

target.text: Progressive increase in annual dividend per share excluding special dividend

actual.text: Dividend per share increased by 10% in Q1FY26 compared to previous year
actual.what_happened: Annual dividend per share progressively increased as planned

promises.promise: Final dividend of ₹22 per share for fiscal 2025
promises.quote: Board has recommended a final dividend of ₹22

actual.text: Final dividend of ₹22 per share for fiscal 2025
actual.what_happened: Final dividend of ₹22 per share declared for fiscal 2025

promises.promise: Return approximately 85% of free cash flow cumulatively over five years through dividends and buybacks
promises.quote: The Company expects to continue returning approximately 85% of free cash flow cumulatively over the five-year period
promises.metric: Free cash flow return ~85% cumulatively over 5 years

target.text: ~85% free cash flow return cumulatively over 5 years

actual.text: Infosys has returned approximately 40% of free cash flow cumulatively over the first two years of the five-year period
actual.what_happened: Reported cumulative free cash flow return at 40% after two years of the five-year target period

credibility.method: Conf-weighted delivery rate over testable promises (MET=1, PARTIAL=0.5, MISSED=0; H=1.0,M=0.8,L=0.6). Bands A>=75 B>=60 C>=45 D>=30 E<30.
credibility.headline: Mostly delivered on testable promises — chiefly pricing / mix; 36 later targets still not yet testable.
